hero.title: Claude Agent Teams
hero.subtitle: You're the CTO, agents are your team. They handle tasks themselves, message each other, review each other's code. You just look at the kanban board and drink coffee.

features.title: Agent Teams
features.description: Create teams with different roles. Agents work autonomously in parallel, communicate with each other, and collaborate across teams.

features.title: Kanban Board
features.description: Tasks change status in real-time as agents work. Drag, assign, review — all on a visual board.

features.title: Code Review
features.description: Diff view per task with accept, reject, and comment. Built-in code editor with Git support.

features.title: Cross-Team Communication
features.description: Agents message each other within and across teams. Direct messaging, task comments, and quick actions.

features.title: Solo Mode
features.description: Start with a single agent that self-manages tasks. Expand to a full team whenever you need more power.

features.title: Live Processes
features.description: See running agents, open URLs in browser, monitor token usage and session context in real-time.

faq.question: What is Claude Agent Teams?
faq.answer: A desktop app that lets you assemble AI agent teams powered by Claude Code. Each agent has a role, works autonomously, and collaborates with teammates — all managed through a kanban board.

faq.question: Is it really free?
faq.answer: Yes. The app itself is 100% free and open source. You just need a Claude subscription (Max or Pro plan) — that's it. Claude Code is installed and set up automatically through our app, no terminal required.

faq.question: Which platforms are supported?
faq.answer: macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel), Windows, and Linux.

faq.question: How does it work?
faq.answer: Install the app, create a team, assign roles — agents start working in parallel. You monitor progress on the kanban board, review code diffs, and communicate with agents directly.

faq.question: Is my code private?
faq.answer: Everything runs locally on your machine. No data is sent to external servers. Your code, conversations, and agent activity stay entirely private.

faq.question: What do I need to get started?
faq.answer: Just install the app — it includes built-in Claude Code installation and authentication. Zero-setup onboarding gets you running in minutes.

download.title: Download
download.note: Choose your platform and start building with AI agent teams.

testimonials.name: Alex K.
testimonials.text: Finally, a tool that lets me manage AI agents like I manage my engineering team. The kanban board is a game-changer for keeping track of parallel agent work.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Solo mode is perfect for quick tasks. When I need more firepower, I spin up a full team in seconds. The cross-team communication just works.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: The code review workflow is brilliant — diff view per task, accept/reject, comments. It's like having a team of junior devs that actually follow instructions.

testimonials.name: Yuki T.
testimonials.text: Live process monitoring and context tracking are incredibly useful. I can see exactly what each agent is doing and how much context they're using.

testimonials.name: Maria S.
testimonials.text: Zero-setup onboarding is real — installed the app, authenticated once, and had agents working on my codebase within 5 minutes. No API keys, no config files.

testimonials.name: Chris L.
testimonials.text: This completely changed how I prototype. I set up agent teams for different parts of the stack and let them work in parallel. 10x productivity boost, no joke.

pricing.name: Free Forever
pricing.description: Everything included. No limits, no API keys, no credit card.
